meaning: adj.贫脊的,不育的,不结果的,消过毒的,毫无结果的
examples: He was able to bring large sterile acreages back to fertility.
He always made sure that any cuts were protected by sterile dressings.
This top fits over the bottle and keeps the teat sterile.
But Americans must move beyond sterile ideological debates and tackle the weaknesses head on.
Cultured meat could be grown in sterile conditions, avoiding Salmonella, E. coli, Campylobacter and other nasties.
